channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [BHARATCOAL] Bharat Coking Coal Appoints Rajeev Sinha as Director (Technical)
item.description:
Shri Rajeev Kumar Sinha has assumed the additional charge of Director (Technical) Project & Planning at Bharat Coking Coal Limited, effective May 1, 2026. This appointment, approved by the Hon’ble Minister of Coal, Government of India, designates him as a Director and Key Managerial Personnel (KMP) of the company. Shri Sinha is currently Director (Technical) at CMPDI and brings over 34 years of extensive experience in the coal mining sector, having served in various key positions across BCCL, CCL, and CMPDI. He holds a Mining Engineering degree and an M.Tech in Environmental Science and Engineering from IIT (Indian School of Mines), Dhanbad, along with a First Class Mine Manager’s Certificate of Competency. His expertise spans mine planning, environmental management, project development, and corporate strategy.

  • Rajeev Kumar Sinha appointed Director (Technical) Project & Planning.
  • Appointment effective May 1, 2026, making him a Key Managerial Personnel.
  • Sinha brings over 34 years of extensive experience in coal mining.
  • He holds degrees from IIT (ISM), Dhanbad and a First Class Mine Manager’s Certificate.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bharat Coking Coal Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [NUTRA] Nutraplus reports Q1 FY25 net loss of ₹0.39 Lacs
item.description:
Nutraplus India Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on November 27, 2024, approved the unaudited financial results for the quarter ended June 30, 2024. The company reported a net loss of ₹0.39 Lacs for the quarter, with no revenue from operations. Total income from operations was also nil, while total expenditures amounted to ₹0.39 Lacs. The delay in submitting these quarterly results was attributed to operational disruptions caused by the COVID-19 pandemic and the subsequent auctioning of the company's property, plants, and equipment under the SARFAESI Act, 2002. The company operates solely in the Active Pharmaceutical Ingredient (API) segment.

  • Board approved unaudited financial results for Q1 FY25 on November 27, 2024.
  • Company reported a net loss of ₹0.39 Lacs for the quarter ended June 30, 2024.
  • Revenue from operations was nil, with total expenditures at ₹0.39 Lacs.
  • Delay in results submission due to COVID-19 and SARFAESI Act property auction.
  • Nutraplus India operates exclusively in the Active Pharmaceutical Ingredient (API) segment.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nutraplus India Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [MANYAVAR] Vedant Fashions Board to Meet for Q4/FY26 Results & Dividend
item.description:
Vedant Fashions Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on Friday, May 8, 2026. The agenda for the meeting includes the consideration and approval of the Audited Financial Results/Financial Statements for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will consider recommending a final dividend on the equity shares of the company for the financial year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 8, 2026.
  • To consider and approve Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • To recommend final dividend for financial year ended March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vedant Fashions Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [VPRPL] Vishnu Prakash R Punglia to Raise Up to ₹300 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

The Board of Directors of Vishnu Prakash R Punglia Ltd has approved raising funds up to ₹300 crores in one or more tranches. The fund raise will be executed through the issuance of equity shares and/or equity-linked instruments, via preferential allotment, rights issue, warrants, bonds, or any other permissible mode or combination of methods. The decision is subject to applicable approvals, including shareholders’ and regulatory/statutory approvals. Further disclosures will be made upon finalization of the details.

  • Board approves raising up to ₹300 Cr via equity or equity-linked instruments.
  • Fund raising may occur in one or more tranches.
  • Methods include preferential allotment, rights issue, warrants, and bonds.
  • The fundraise is subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vishnu Prakash R Punglia Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SOLARWORLD] Solarworld Energy Solutions Appoints 4 Independent Directors
item.description:
Solarworld Energy Solutions Ltd has appointed Mr. Rajiv Gupta, Ms. Ritu Hastir, Mr. Subhash Kumar Changoiwala, and Mr. Upendra Goyal as Additional Independent Directors, effective May 1, 2026, for a term of five years, subject to shareholder approval. The company also approved alterations to its Memorandum of Association, including deleting clauses related to the food products business and inserting new sub-clauses related to Sections 179, 180, 185, and 186 of the Companies Act, 2013. A postal ballot will be conducted to seek shareholder approval for these matters.

  • Mr. Rajiv Gupta appointed as Additional Independent Director effective May 1, 2026.
  • Ms. Ritu Hastir appointed as Additional Independent Director effective May 1, 2026.
  • Mr. Subhash Kumar Changoiwala appointed as Additional Independent Director effective May 1, 2026.
  • Mr. Upendra Goyal appointed as Additional Independent Director effective May 1, 2026.
  • Alteration of Memorandum of Association approved, pending shareholder approval.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Solarworld Energy Solutions Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SOLARWORLD] Solarworld Board Approves MOA Alteration, Appoints Four Independent Directors
item.description:
Solarworld Energy Solutions Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on May 1, 2026, approved the alteration of the company's Memorandum of Association (MOA). This includes the deletion of existing main object clauses related to food products and the insertion of new sub-clauses under Clause III(b) pertaining to Sections 179, 180, 185, and 186 of the Companies Act, 2013. Additionally, the Board approved the appointment of four new non-executive independent directors: Mr. Rajiv Gupta, Ms. Ritu Hastir, Mr. Subhash Kumar Changoiwala, and Mr. Upendra Goyal, each for a five-year term, effective May 1, 2026. All approvals are subject to shareholder consent via a postal ballot.

  • Board approved alteration of Memorandum of Association (MOA) to delete food product business clauses.
  • New MOA clauses to be inserted relating to Companies Act, 2013 sections 179, 180, 185, and 186.
  • Four new independent directors appointed: Mr. Rajiv Gupta, Ms. Ritu Hastir, Mr. Subhash Kumar Changoiwala, and Mr. Upendra Goyal.
  • Each independent director is appointed for a five-year term, effective May 1, 2026.
  • All resolutions are subject to shareholder approval via postal ballot.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Solarworld Energy Solutions Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [JINDALSTEL] Jindal Steel recommends ₹2/share final dividend for FY26
item.description:
Jindal Steel Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on May 1, 2026, approved the audited financial results for Q4 and the full financial year ended March 31, 2026. The Board also recommended a final dividend of 200%, equivalent to ₹2/- per equity share (face value ₹1/-) for FY2025-26. This dividend is subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. Additionally, the Board approved the re-appointment of M/s Shome & Banerjee as the Cost Auditors for the Financial Year 2026-27. The statutory auditors, Lodha & Co. LLP, issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results.

  • Board recommended ₹2/share final dividend for FY2025-26.
  • Dividend is 200% of face value, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Approved audited financial results for Q4 and full year FY2025-26.
  • Re-appointed M/s Shome & Banerjee as Cost Auditors for FY2026-27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JINDAL STEEL & POWER LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [EMERALD] Emerald Finance partners with Studio Morphosis for Early-Wage-Access
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Emerald Finance Ltd has partnered with Studio Morphosis Private Limited, Delhi, to offer its Early-Wage-Access program to the employees of Studio Morphosis. This initiative aims to provide employees with instant financial relief by enabling them to access a portion of their salaries throughout the month. Emerald Finance is expanding its offerings to serve retail customers with a salary advance solution, where short-term loans are offered as salary advances and collected through salary deductions.

  • Emerald Finance partners with Studio Morphosis for Early-Wage-Access program.
  • The program allows employees to access part of their salaries early.
  • This partnership aims to provide instant financial relief to employees.
  • Emerald Finance is expanding its retail offerings with a salary advance solution.
  • Loan amounts will be collected through salary deductions.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Emerald Leasing Finance & Investment Company Ltd | Category: Partnership

item.title: [ZENTEC] ZEN Tech Board Approves FY26 Results, Recommends ","1 Dividend, Sets AGM
item.description:
ZEN Technologies Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on May 01, 2026, approved the audited financial results for FY2025-26 and unaudited results for Q4 FY2025-26, with an unmodified opinion from statutory auditors. The board recommended a final dividend of ","1/- per equity share (100%) for FY2025-26, to be declared at the 33rd Annual General Meeting (AGM). The AGM is scheduled for August 29, 2026, with the record date for dividend and AGM set as August 21, 2026. Additionally, the board approved the appointment of Dr. Sreenivas Rao Yellamanchali as Chief Technology Officer (CTO), M/s. NSVR & Associates LLP as Internal Auditor, and M/s. M P R & Associates as Cost Auditor for FY2026-27.

  • Board approved FY2025-26 audited results and Q4 unaudited results.
  • Recommended final dividend of ","1 per equity share for FY2025-26.
  • 33rd Annual General Meeting scheduled for August 29, 2026.
  • Record date for dividend and AGM is August 21, 2026.
  • Dr. Sreenivas Rao Yellamanchali appointed as Chief Technology Officer.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ZEN TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ZENTEC] ZEN Technologies Appoints Dr. Sreenivas Rao Yellamanchali as CTO
item.description:
ZEN Technologies Ltd announced the appointment of Dr. Sreenivas Rao Yellamanchali as Chief Technology Officer (CTO), effective May 06, 2026. This decision was made at the Board of Directors meeting held on May 01, 2026. During the meeting, the Board also approved the Standalone and Consolidated Audited Financial Results for the year ended March 31, 2026, and the Unaudited Financial Results for Q4 FY2025-26, with statutory auditors issuing an unmodified opinion. Furthermore, the Board recommended a final dividend of ₹1/- per equity share (100%) for FY2025-26, to be declared at the 33rd Annual General Meeting (AGM) scheduled for August 29, 2026. The company also approved the appointment of M/s. NSVR & Associates LLP as Internal Auditor and M/s. M P R & Associates as Cost Auditor for FY2026-27.

  • Dr. Sreenivas Rao Yellamanchali appointed CTO, effective May 06, 2026.
  • Board approved FY26 annual and Q4 financial results with unmodified opinion.
  • Final dividend of ₹1/- per share (100%) recommended for FY26.
  • 33rd Annual General Meeting scheduled for August 29, 2026.
  • New Internal and Cost Auditors appointed for FY2026-27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ZEN TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Management Change
